# Amina Javed

> Full Stack Software Engineer based in Faisalabad, Pakistan, open to work, with .NET enterprise development experience since August 2022 and 14 professional certifications.

Amina Javed builds enterprise backends, REST APIs, WinForms desktop applications, Blazor web apps, and IoT integrations. She is a Software Engineer at Beacon Impex Pvt. Ltd. and a BCS graduate from FAST NUCES (2018–2022).

## Portfolio

- [Homepage](https://aminajaved.com/): Official portfolio with biography, experience, education, and contact details
- [Projects](https://aminajaved.com/#projects): 17 software projects with screenshots, descriptions, and live demo links
- [Certifications](https://aminajaved.com/#skills): 14 professional certificates from Meta, IBM, Microsoft, and Google
- [Contact](https://aminajaved.com/#contact): Email, LinkedIn, and phone for hiring inquiries

## Profiles

- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/aminajaved1999): Professional profile, experience, and networking
- [GitHub](https://github.com/aminajaved1999): Code repositories and deployed project demos

## Live Projects

- [GeoHealth Tracker](https://aminajaved1999.github.io/GeoHealth-Tracker/): Interactive health facility map using OpenStreetMap and Leaflet.js
- [EventEase](https://aminajaved1999.github.io/EventEase-Blazor/): Blazor WebAssembly event management application
